description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a black gable roof and white exterior walls. The property features a spacious driveway leading to a covered porch at the front, with a manicured lawn and a prominent tree. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating, a rectangular swimming pool, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large panes allowing ample natural light. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially set back and featuring a balcony. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with simple lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A spacious modern suburban house with a black gable roof, white walls, a front porch, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The property is landscaped with trees and a large driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, covered porch, main entry, and a tree on the front lawn.
description_view_1: Backyard view highlighting the patio seating area, swimming pool, and mature trees.
description_view_2: Rear corner view displaying the pool, patio, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Side view showing the garage, driveway extension, and a balcony above the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, a single main door, and a small overhang supported by columns
